name: RootedAI Action Manifest
description: Guidance for AI agents on how to interact with RootedAI's digital infrastructure. Optimized for reasoning models (DeepSeek-V3, GPT-4o, Claude-3.5).

actions.name: Book a Discovery Call
actions.description: Submit a business inquiry to the RootedAI engineering team. This is the primary conversion point.

parameters.name: Full name of the lead
parameters.service_needed: One of: Machine Perception, Edge Deployment, Process Flow, AI Safety, Custom Request
parameters.message: Detailed project description or mission requirements

ui_fallback.note: Opening the modal will require reCAPTCHA solving. Use the API endpoint for headless interaction.

actions.name: View Case Studies
actions.description: Examine past deployments in robotics and manufacturing.
